docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BYER, KURT DBA  THE XCEL GROUP, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BYER, KURT DBA  THE XCEL GROUP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENFIELD, ELIZABETH $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,634.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
